description: Capabilities approved for AutoMindLab enterprise use in translated, governed form.

entries.name: OpenClaw CLI runtime topology management
entries.sourceRepoOrSource: OpenClaw CLI and gateway configuration surface
entries.rollbackNotes: Reapply the repo-managed topology and workspace seeds before restarting the gateway if drift is detected.
entries.reviewNotes: Approved because the repo wraps OpenClaw through scripts, validators, and runbooks instead of relying on ad hoc local commands.
entries.enterpriseJustification: Provides the runtime owner with a controlled way to enforce the AutoMindLab host and worker topology.
entries.boundaryDecision: Wrap the tool in reviewed scripts and validators. Do not hand it to downstream products as an unmanaged operator shortcut.

entries.name: BMO browser research pattern
entries.sourceRepoOrSource: bmo-stack browser research and escalation routines
entries.rollbackNotes: Retire or narrow the translated skill if it drifts from AutoMindLab network policy or host and worker escalation rules.
entries.reviewNotes: Approved in translated form only. The enterprise version lives in `.ona/skills/` and policy docs, not as a local shell routine.
entries.enterpriseJustification: Improves evidence gathering and diagnosis while keeping network posture explicit and reviewable.
entries.boundaryDecision: Curate the pattern into AutoMindLab skills and runbooks. Reject any BMO-specific workstation UX or operator shell assumptions.

entries.name: BMO workstation manifest and supervised action pattern
entries.sourceRepoOrSource: bmo-stack Windows workstation manifest and approval policy
entries.rollbackNotes: Remove or narrow manifest-backed actions if they drift beyond reviewed runtime-owner entrypoints.
entries.reviewNotes: Approved only as an enterprise operator-surface contract and approval policy. The direct Windows UI remains outside this repo.
entries.enterpriseJustification: Improves operator trust and future admin-surface reuse by making actions, docs, and approval boundaries machine-readable.
entries.boundaryDecision: Translate the action map and approval policy into repo-owned contracts. Do not import the BMO Windows UI or local task shell directly.
